Video.summary: Emeril and young chef CJ Calhoun make a meal any kid would love!
Video.title: with CJ Calhoun, Dominique Taylor

Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril shares his love of mushrooms with these recipes.
Video.title: Wild Mushrooms

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Scott Maurer compose an entire meal around Louisiana oysters.
Video.title: with Scott Maurer

Video.summary: Emeril and Voodoo priestesses Brandi and Maggie celebrate New Orleans' annual Voodoo Fest.
Video.title: with Mambo Brandi, Mambo Maggie

Video.summary: Emeril and jazz legend Kermit Ruffins classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Kermit Ruffins

Video.summary: Emeril prepares a Tex-Mex menu to dazzle Houston Texan superfans.
Video.title: Houston Texans

Video.summary: Emeril, Lindsey Brower, and Nan Wallis create a mouth-watering meal inspired by locally-brewed sake.
Video.title: with Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Janie Glade create an economical meal that makes use of pantry staples.
Video.title: with Janie Glade

Video.summary: Emeril and dairy farm owner Sarah Roland create dishes using buffalo mozzarella.
Video.title: with Sarah Roland

Video.summary: Emeril and interns Asia Magee and Chassidy Carter take on classic down-home dishes made at Cafe Reconcile.
Video.title: with Asia Magree, Chassidy Carter

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare dishes inspired by Shermond's brunch menu.
Video.title: with Shermond Esteen

Video.summary: Celebrate Cleveland's roots with a Polish-inspired tailgate menu.
Video.title: Cleveland Browns

Video.title: Fish and Chips

Video.title: French Toast

Video.title: Taste of Spain

Video.summary: For the next tailgate, take a cue from Emeril's home team the New Orleans Saints.
Video.title: New Orleans Saints

Video.title: Las Vegas Raiders

Video.summary: Emeril is going back to the basics. Whether you're a novice or an advanced cook, you'll love these recipes.
Video.title: Back to Basics: Cooking School 101

Video.summary: Young EJ and little sister Meril join dad Emeril to make some of their favorite recipes.
Video.title: Cooking with Your Kids

Video.summary: Root for your home team with Emeril's sports party favorites.
Video.title: Sports Party

Video.summary: Emeril presents recipes from his New Orleans restaurants.
Video.title: Emeril's Restaurant Classics

Video.summary: New York City firefighters turn up the heat in Emeril's kitchen.
Video.title: Turn Up the Heat

Video.summary: Emeril shows the most useful kitchen equipment (and how they make getting dinner on the table easier).
Video.title: Which Pan is for What?
